name: Mexacali Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 ounces low-sodium fat-free chicken broth, or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F. Roast the pepper on an oven rack for 15 minutes or until the skin blisters. Wrap the pepper in a paper towel or put it in a paper bag and set aside for 10 minutes.
2. Heat the oil in a large saucepan. Add the onion and potato; sauté for 5 minutes. Add the water, broth, and salt; cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Add the corn and simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes.
3. Peel the skin from the pepper and discard it. Place the flesh in a food processor or blender. Add the corn mixture and tofu; process or blend until pureed. Strain the soup if desired. Garnish with remaining kernels of corn. Serve hot or chilled.
